meta.role: Senior AI Engineer - Founding Team, Redrob AI

yoe_fit.explain: JD band 5-9 yrs, 'a range not a requirement' - soft shoulders

core_title_family.explain: current/recent role in applied ML/IR; adjacent eng roles partial credit

product_company_tenure.explain: share of career months at product companies (JD: 4-5 yrs applied ML at product companies, not services)

trajectory.explain: seniority slope >= 0 across roles; ascending careers preferred

stability.explain: median tenure; JD wants 3+ year commitment

location_fit.explain: Pune/Noida preferred; Tier-1 welcome; relocation counts

external_validation.explain: github_activity_score as open-source/external-validation proxy; -1 (no GitHub) = neutral 0.5, never punished as zero

core_skill_coverage.explain: share of core JD skill categories with CORROBORATED evidence (narrative or assessment) - the skills list alone never scores

positives: built and shipped a search ranking system used by real users in production
developed a recommendation engine serving millions of users
improved search relevance and ranking quality for a consumer product
deployed a learning to rank model for personalized search results
designed and launched a matching system that ranks items or people for users
built the system that decides which items or products users see first when they browse
owned the logic that orders the results people see when they look for something in the app
shipped_search_ranking_reco.explain: JD ideal: 'shipped at least one end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system to real users at meaningful scale'

positives: deployed embeddings based semantic retrieval in production
built a vector search pipeline with FAISS or a vector database serving live traffic
implemented dense retrieval with sentence transformer embeddings for real users
operated and refreshed a vector index in a production search system
built hybrid retrieval combining BM25 keyword search with dense embeddings
converted text into numerical vector form so the system finds similar items even when the words differ
matched what users type to catalog items by meaning instead of exact keyword match
production_embeddings_retrieval.explain: JD absolute need: production experience with embeddings-based retrieval and vector databases

positives: designed offline evaluation with NDCG MRR or MAP for ranking quality
ran A/B tests to measure search relevance and ranking improvements
built an evaluation framework and metrics for a recommender system
ran controlled experiments with a share of users to measure whether the new result ordering helped them find what they wanted
tracked how often users clicked one of the first few results to judge quality of the ordering
ranking_evaluation.explain: JD absolute need: hands-on evaluation frameworks for ranking systems

positives: deployed machine learning models serving high traffic in production at scale
built ML pipelines with monitoring retraining and alerting in production
optimized model inference latency for large scale production serving
built NLP systems such as text classification entity extraction or query understanding in production
worked on information retrieval and text search systems before large language models became popular
nlp_ir_depth.explain: JD: 'understood retrieval and ranking before it became fashionable'

positives: fine-tuned large language models with LoRA or PEFT for a production use case
built LLM powered features with retrieval augmented generation deployed to users

credibility.explain: 2026 reality: LLMs made coherent narrative free to fabricate, so narrative coherence alone no longer earns full trust. Without ANY hard evidence (platform assessment scores or a linked GitHub), C is dampened and capped so narrative-only profiles cannot outrank assessed ones. Verified platform telemetry remains costly to fake.

predicate_negatives: completed an online course and earned a certification
wrote a tutorial blog post about a popular framework
managed project timelines stakeholders and team communication
designed marketing campaigns and social media content
prepared dashboards and business reports for management review
developed responsive web user interfaces with React and CSS
built mobile applications for Android and iOS
managed financial accounting ledgers and reporting
created visual designs logos and brand assets
recruited candidates scheduled interviews and managed HR processes
wrote and executed manual test cases for application releases
maintained servers networks and IT support infrastructure
supervised construction site work and civil engineering projects
designed mechanical components using CAD modelling

predicate_scoring.explain: predicate = scaled( max-over-sentences( cos_pos - cos_nearest_negative ) ); BGE raw cosines have a ~0.6 floor for ANY pair, so only the contrastive margin separates signal from noise. floor/full calibrated on sample distribution (noise p90 ~ +0.05, genuine evidence > +0.10)

research_only.explain: JD explicit: pure research career without production deployment - will not move forward

services_only.explain: JD explicit: consulting-firms-only careers (TCS/Infosys/Wipro/...) screened out

title_hopper.explain: JD explicit: title-chasers switching every ~1.5 years

manager_no_code.explain: JD explicit: architecture/lead roles with no production code in 18 months - this role writes code

cv_speech_only.explain: JD explicit: CV/speech/robotics expertise without NLP/IR exposure

framework_only_ai.explain: JD explicit: recent LangChain-only AI experience without pre-LLM ML production depth

non_tech_no_evidence.explain: no technical role anywhere in career AND zero corroborated ML/IR evidence - crisp-rule points alone cannot carry a non-technical profile

adjacent_without_depth.explain: adjacent-tech career (backend/data-eng/devops) without enough corroborated ML/IR depth or strong narrative predicate evidence

no_core_evidence.explain: company/location/tenure fit not backed by ANY core ML/IR evidence - fit-shaped is not fit

bm25_query: machine learning engineer embeddings retrieval vector search ranking recommendation relevance semantic search production deployed NLP information retrieval LLM fine-tuning evaluation NDCG A/B testing Python recommender personalization
